strap: Tees Valley Digital draws £118m of UKRI lead-led funding across 70 grants, anchored by Teesside University (17%), Tees, Esk And Wear Valleys Nhs Foundation Trust (10%), with Thirteen Housing Group on the industrial side.
behaviour: The cluster shows low-confidence "Forgiving instead of redesigning" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
